Added_Other.name: DFIntGetMeshPartJointOffsetTelemetryThrottle
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the frequency of data collection for mesh part joint offsets.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances performance by reducing unnecessary data processing during gameplay.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAXMISRemoveSingleItemPurchaseFromTryOn
Added_Other.mechanism: Removes the option to try on single items before purchasing.
Added_Other.purpose: Streamlines the purchasing process for players by focusing on bulk purchases.

Added_Network.name: FFlagDelayAudioFocusReplication
Added_Network.mechanism: Introduces a delay in how audio focus changes are communicated.
Added_Network.purpose: Reduces audio interruptions during gameplay, creating a more immersive experience.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes dynamic strings for version control in the repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players have access to the latest features and fixes more reliably.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how dynamic strings with timestamps are formatted.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves readability and presentation of time-related information in games.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the efficiency of version tracking and updates for developers.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes string handling for timestamps to improve performance.
Changed_Other.purpose: Makes games run smoother by reducing delays when processing time-related data.

Removed_Other.name: DFIntGetMeshPartJointOffsetTelemetryThrottle_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Limits the frequency of telemetry data collection for joint offsets in mesh parts.
Removed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by reducing unnecessary data processing.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagAXMISRemoveSingleItemPurchaseFromTryOn_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Removes the option to try on items that can only be purchased individually.
Removed_Other.purpose: Simplifies the try-on process for players, making it easier to explore items.

Removed_Network.name: FFlagDelayAudioFocusReplication_Staged
Removed_Network.mechanism: Delays the update of audio focus changes to improve performance.
Removed_Network.purpose: Reduces lag when multiple sounds are playing, making the audio experience smoother.

Added_Other.name: DFFlagPMDHeaderBlockDetection
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables detection of header blocks in the Player Model Data.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game security and performance by preventing issues related to player model data.

Added_Other.name: FFlagLoadRawBytecodeWithHashKey
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows the game engine to load bytecode using a hash key for verification.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances security and performance by ensuring only verified code is executed.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSimPartOperationRemoveCSGMesh8
Added_Other.mechanism: Removes the use of CSG meshes in simulation parts to improve performance.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances game performance by reducing complexity in simulations.
